commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=85c74c586763d2de20fcd09defe35afd9eb1fc03)
commands.review_summary:
The PR restyles the WinUI Agent Events page with a SelectorBar filter row, toolbar Clear button with icon, Fluent empty state, card styling, expand affordance policy, and locale resource updates.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding via source inspection: the PR adds x:Uid="ClearButton" to a Button with StackPanel content while Resources.resw still has ClearButton.Content. The full visual redesign was not reproduced because no real UI artifact is attached.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for redacted real UI proof and the small Clear-button localization fix before ordinary maintainer review can proceed.

target.title: Tidy Agent Events page UI (Fluent / WinUI design)
target.body:
Tidies the Agent Events page (Companion Settings) to align with the OpenClaw / Fluent / winuxe design rules. UI-only — no behavior changes.

### Changes
- **Layout** matches `PermissionsPage`: `Padding="24,16,24,16"`, `MaxWidth="900"`, `HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"` — content grows white side margins as the window widens.
- **Header** adds an intro subtitle caption explaining what the feed shows.
- **Toolbar row**: agent picker (`ComboBox.PlaceholderText="All Agents"`) on the left, `Clear` button with the Fluent Delete glyph on the right (was buried in the footer).
- **Filter chips** replaced with a `SelectorBar` of `SelectorBarItem`s (matches `SessionsPage`); resw keys' suffix changed from `.Content` to `.Text`.
- **Empty state** uses a Segoe Fluent `History` glyph (new `FluentIconCatalog.AgentEvents`) instead of a 🤖 emoji — emoji are never a WinUI render target.
- **Typography** uses `BodyTextBlockStyle` / `CaptionTextBlockStyle` instead of raw `FontSize` (winuxe rule #4); under-12 px sizes lifted to the readable floor.
- **Cards** add `BorderBrush={ThemeResource CardStrokeColorDefaultBrush}`, `CornerRadius=8`.
- **Expand affordance**: chevron is hidden and click-to-expand is suppressed for rows with nothing to reveal (new `AgentEventInfo.CanExpand`).
- **Localization**: new `AgentEventsPage_IntroText.Text` seeded English across all 5 locales (deferred-translation precedent); allow-listed in `LocalizationValidationTests`.

### Validation
- `./build.ps1` ✅
- `OpenClaw.Shared.Tests` ✅ 1891 passed / 29 skipped
- `OpenClaw.Tray.Tests` ✅ 1178 passed
- Smoke-tested locally in this worktree.
target.author: bkudiess
